<?php
public function get_activity_items( $request ) {
        $params = $request->get_params();

        $includeMeta    = (isset($params['meta'])) ? boolval($params['meta']) : false;
        $orderBy        = (isset($params['order_by'])) ? sanitize_text_field($params['order_by']) : 'title';
        $postsPerPage   = (isset($params['page_size'])) ? intval($params['page_size']) : -1;
        $page           = (isset($params['page'])) ? intval($params['page']) : 1;

        $args = array(
            'orderby' => $orderBy,
            'order' => 'ASC',
            'post_type' => CU_ACTIVITY_POST_TYPE,
            'posts_per_page' => $postsPerPage,
            'paged' => $page,
        	'meta_query'	=> [
        		'relation'		=> 'OR',
        		[
        			'key'	 	=> 'archive',
        			'value'	  	=> 1,
        			'compare' 	=> '!=',
        		],[
        			'key'	 	=> 'archive',
        			'compare' 	=> 'NOT EXISTS',
        		],
        	],
        );

        $responseData = [
            'page' => $page,
            'posts_per_page' => $postsPerPage,
            'total_pages' => 1,
            'total_count' => 0,
            'count' => 0,
            'items' => [],
        ];

        $query = new \WP_Query($args);

        if ( $query->have_posts() ) {
            while ( $query->have_posts() ) { $query->the_post();

                $postObject = $query->post;
                $postMeta = get_fields($query->post->ID);

                $postObject->featured_image = (isset($postMeta['featured_image']) && is_array($postMeta['featured_image'])) ? $postMeta['featured_image']['sizes']['medium'] : null;
                $postObject->duration = intval($postMeta['duration']);
                $postObject->description = $postMeta['short_description'];
                $postObject->keywords = $postMeta['search_keywords'];

                $ratingCount = (isset($postMeta['rating_count'])) ? $postMeta['rating_count'] : 0;
                $postObject->rating = ($ratingCount > 1 && isset($postMeta['average_rating'])) ? floatval($postMeta['average_rating']) : 0;

                $postObject->permalink = get_permalink($postObject);
                unset($postObject->guid);

                $postObject->id = $postObject->ID;
                unset($postObject->ID);

                unset($postObject->post_content);
                unset($postObject->menu_order);
                unset($postObject->post_parent);
                unset($postObject->post_excerpt);
                unset($postObject->ping_status);
                unset($postObject->comment_status);
                unset($postObject->post_author);
                unset($postObject->to_ping);
                unset($postObject->pinged);
                unset($postObject->post_content_filtered);
                unset($postObject->post_mime_type);
                unset($postObject->comment_count);
                unset($postObject->filter);
                unset($postObject->post_modified);
                unset($postObject->post_modified_gmt);
                unset($postObject->post_date_gmt);
                unset($postObject->post_password);
                unset($postObject->post_type);

                $topics = [];
                if(isset($postMeta['related_topics']) && is_array($postMeta['related_topics'])) {
                    $topics = [];
                    foreach($postMeta['related_topics'] as $termId) {
                        $topics[] = $this->getTermFromId($termId, CU_TOPIC_TAXONOMY);
                    }
                }
                $postObject->topics = $topics;

                if($includeMeta) {
                    $postObject->meta = $postMeta;
                }

                foreach($postObject as $key=>$value) {
                    if(substr( $key, 0, 5 ) === 'post_') {
                        $postObject->{str_replace('post_', '', $key)} = $value;
                        unset($postObject->{$key});
                    }
                }

                $responseData['items'][] = $postObject;
            }

            wp_reset_postdata();
            wp_reset_query();
        }

        $responseData['total_count'] = $query->found_posts;
        $responseData['total_pages'] = $query->max_num_pages;
        $responseData['count'] = count($responseData['items']);
        $response = rest_ensure_response( $responseData );

        return $response;
    }

SELECT
    u.ID,
    u.user_login,
    u.user_email,
    u.user_registered,
    CONCAT(um_first.meta_value, ' ', um_last.meta_value) AS full_name,

<?php
public static function prime_term_cache( array $posts = [], array $taxonomies = [ 'post_tag', \Tribe__Events__Main::TAXONOMY ], bool $prime_term_meta = false ): array {
    if ( empty( $posts ) ) { return []; }

    $first = reset( $posts );
    $is_numeric = ( ! $first instanceof \WP_Post );
    $ids = $is_numeric ? $posts : wp_list_pluck( $posts, 'ID' );
    $cache = [];

    foreach ( $ids as $id ) {
        foreach ( $taxonomies as $taxonomy ) {
            $cache[ $id ][ $taxonomy ] = [];
        }
    }

    $args  = [
        'fields'     => 'all_with_object_id',
        'object_ids' => $ids,
        'taxonomy'   => $taxonomies,
    ];
    $terms = get_terms( $args );

    $valid_terms = array_filter( (array) $terms, static function ( $term ) {
        return $term instanceof \WP_Term;
    } );
    $term_ids = wp_list_pluck( $valid_terms, 'term_id' );

    foreach ( $valid_terms as $term ) {
        $cache[ $term->object_id ][ $term->taxonomy ][] = $term->term_id;
    }
    foreach ( $cache as $id => $object_taxonomies ) {
        if ( empty( $id ) ) { continue; }
        foreach ( $object_taxonomies as $taxonomy => $term_ids ) {
            if ( empty( $taxonomy ) ) { continue; }
            wp_cache_add( $id, $term_ids, $taxonomy . '_relationships' );
        }
    }

    _prime_term_caches( $term_ids, $prime_term_meta );
    return $cache;
}
